name: Algorithmic Art
description: Create gallery-quality generative algorithmic art using p5.js with seeded randomness and interactive parameter exploration. The skill guides Claude to first develop an algorithmic philosophy (a computational aesthetic movement), then implement it as a fully self-contained interactive HTML artifact with Anthropic branding, seed navigation, and tunable parameter controls. Suitable for flow fields, particle systems, noise-driven compositions, and emergent visual systems.

findings_summary.notes: Official Anthropic skill from anthropics/skills repository. Contains SKILL.md with detailed instructions, JavaScript templates (generator_template.js, viewer.html), and Apache-2.0 LICENSE.txt. Verified present in anthropics/skills repo tree at skills/algorithmic-art/.
